hero_match.title: New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I (Match Concluded)

ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield: NSW vs WA (Match Ended in Draw)

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I concluded with New Zealand winning by 68 runs to level the series 1-1. The Sheffield Shield match between NSW and WA also ended in a draw today.
